evals.prompt: Extract the avalara-tax app so I can make some changes to the hook implementations.
evals.expected_output: Finds and extracts avalara-tax ZIP from tax/avalara-tax/, shows extracted path, reminds to delete before committing.

evals.prompt: I want to look at how the stripe-payment app is structured.
evals.expected_output: Finds and extracts stripe-payment ZIP from payment/stripe-payment/, shows extracted path so user can browse the files.

evals.prompt: Extract tax/avalara-tax so I can fix the impex files.
evals.expected_output: Extracts avalara-tax ZIP using the provided domain/app path directly, shows extracted path.
